intro:
Tinder Gold costs $30+/month. eHarmony exceeds $60/month. Match runs ~$40/month. Dating apps have become one of the most expensive monthly subscriptions.

Embir is free for core connections. Full features accessible without a subscription.

sections.title: The real cost of dating apps in 2026
sections.content: If you use Tinder Gold for 6 months, you've spent $180. Hinge Preferred for 6 months = $180. eHarmony for 6 months = $360. These platforms monetize loneliness — the longer you stay single, the more you pay. Everything needed to meet someone is free. No credit card required.
highlights: No hidden subscription, no credit card required

verdict: The most affordable dating app in 2026 is Embir — free for core connections. Verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, full messaging, zero dollars.
ctaText: The best value dating app — join Embir free

faq.q: Is Embir the cheapest dating app?
faq.a: Yes for core connection features. Core features are free. No subscription, no credit card.

faq.q: Are there hidden costs on Embir?
faq.a: No. No hidden fees. the optional-service policy will be announced in advance.
Everything needed to meet someone is free. No credit card required. Optional services are clearly separated and cannot replace compatibility, reciprocity or consent.
